full_response:
I need to find the components of the tensor $-6v^a u^b$ in frame R.

Given:
- $v^a$ has components: $v^0 = 5$, $v^1 = -1$, $v^2 = 0$, $v^3 = 1$
- $u^b$ has components: $u^0 = -2$, $u^1 = 1$, $u^2 = 1$, $u^3 = -6$

The tensor $v^a u^b$ is an outer product (or tensor product) of the two vectors. This creates a 4×4 matrix where each component is given by:

$(v^a u^b)^{ab} = v^a u^b$

So the (a,b) component is simply the product of the a-th component of $v$ and the b-th component of $u$.

Let me calculate all 16 components:

For $a = 0$: $v^0 = 5$
- $(v^a u^b)^{00} = v^0 u^0 = 5 \times (-2) = -10$
- $(v^a u^b)^{01} = v^0 u^1 = 5 \times 1 = 5$
- $(v^a u^b)^{02} = v^0 u^2 = 5 \times 1 = 5$
- $(v^a u^b)^{03} = v^0 u^3 = 5 \times (-6) = -30$

For $a = 1$: $v^1 = -1$
- $(v^a u^b)^{10} = v^1 u^0 = (-1) \times (-2) = 2$
- $(v^a u^b)^{11} = v^1 u^1 = (-1) \times 1 = -1$
- $(v^a u^b)^{12} = v^1 u^2 = (-1) \times 1 = -1$
- $(v^a u^b)^{13} = v^1 u^3 = (-1) \times (-6) = 6$

For $a = 2$: $v^2 = 0$
- $(v^a u^b)^{20} = v^2 u^0 = 0 \times (-2) = 0$
- $(v^a u^b)^{21} = v^2 u^1 = 0 \times 1 = 0$
- $(v^a u^b)^{22} = v^2 u^2 = 0 \times 1 = 0$
- $(v^a u^b)^{23} = v^2 u^3 = 0 \times (-6) = 0$

For $a = 3$: $v^3 = 1$
- $(v^a u^b)^{30} = v^3 u^0 = 1 \times (-2) = -2$
- $(v^a u^b)^{31} = v^3 u^1 = 1 \times 1 = 1$
- $(v^a u^b)^{32} = v^3 u^2 = 1 \times 1 = 1$
- $(v^a u^b)^{33} = v^3 u^3 = 1 \times (-6) = -6$

So $v^a u^b$ in matrix form is:
$$v^a u^b = \begin{pmatrix}
-10 & 5 & 5 & -30 \\
2 & -1 & -1 & 6 \\
0 & 0 & 0 & 0 \\
-2 & 1 & 1 & -6
\end{pmatrix}$$

Now I need to multiply each component by -6:

$$-6v^a u^b = \begin{pmatrix}
60 & -30 & -30 & 180 \\
-12 & 6 & 6 & -36 \\
0 & 0 & 0 & 0 \\
12 & -6 & -6 & 36
\end{pmatrix}$$

\boxed{\text{The components of } -6v^a u^b \text{ are:}
\begin{array}{ll}
(-6v^a u^b)^{00} = 60 & (-6v^a u^b)^{01} = -30 & (-6v^a u^b)^{02} = -30 & (-6v^a u^b)^{03} = 180 \\
(-6v^a u^b)^{10} = -12 & (-6v^a u^b)^{11} = 6 & (-6v^a u^b)^{12} = 6 & (-6v^a u^b)^{13} = -36 \\
(-6v^a u^b)^{20} = 0 & (-6v^a u^b)^{21} = 0 & (-6v^a u^b)^{22} = 0 & (-6v^a u^b)^{23} = 0 \\
(-6v^a u^b)^{30} = 12 & (-6v^a u^b)^{31} = -6 & (-6v^a u^b)^{32} = -6 & (-6v^a u^b)^{33} = 36
\end{array}}

Confidence: 100%
